name: KASTORE
title: FERVENT

abilities.name: Exalt in Blood
abilities.text: Once per activation. If this model has a Hunger token, reduce damage dealt to it by 2.

abilities.name: Rend the Kin
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may kill a friendly model within 3". If it does so, remove Hunger tokens from all friendly models in LoS.

abilities.name: Terrifying
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

actions.name: Split and Spill
actions.effects: Enemy models within (melee)2" of the target are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Blood Rush
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with a model damaged by this action.

triggers.name: Bloody Tithe
triggers.text: This model may either heal 2 or remove a Hunger token.

actions.name: Visceral Rampage
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation. Move this model up to its Sp in a straight line. Then, place the target in base contact with this model.

triggers.name: Death's Door
triggers.text: The target gains an Incurable token.

triggers.name: Necrotic Decay
triggers.text: This model may deal up to 2 irreducible damage to itself. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage per damage suffered when declaring this trigger.

actions.name: Bountiful Feast
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy models within range must pass a TN 13 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage. Then, this model heals 1 for each model damaged.

triggers.name: Empty the Urn
triggers.text: Once per activation. A friendly Urnbearer may declare an action.

extraction_notes: Totem shown as 'Urnbearer (2)' as a keyword, not as a separate totem field
Crew card name 'Starving Tirade' appears in bottom-left corner
